_instructions: Edit the tip text values below, then give this file back to Claude to apply the changes. Do not rename or remove keys.

property-columns.name: Label for this property — used in charts and comparisons
property-columns.purchase-price: The agreed contract price, excluding stamp duty and acquisition costs
property-columns.deposit: Percentage of purchase price paid upfront. The remainder is borrowed.
property-columns.type: P&I = Principal & Interest. IO = Interest Only (no principal repaid).
property-columns.term: Years over which the mortgage is repaid (P&I loans only)
property-columns.state: Used to calculate stamp duty and other costs using state averages
property-columns.rate: Annual interest rate on your mortgage
property-columns.mgmt: Property manager's fee as a percentage of gross weekly rent
property-columns.rent: Current market rent for the property
property-columns.growth: Expected annual capital growth rate. The long-run Australian average is ~7%.
property-columns.age: Used to estimate annual depreciation on building structure and fixtures

breakdown-cash-up-front.stamp-duty: Based on thresholds for state selected
breakdown-cash-up-front.conveyancing: Based on averages for state selected

breakdown-annual-cash-flow.insurance: Based on averages for state selected

breakdown-tax-benefit.net-rental-position: Annual rent minus deductible expenses. If negative, the loss can offset your taxable income (negative gearing).

projections.usable-equity: 80% of total equity — the maximum most banks will lend against
projections.weekly-rent: Rent increases in line with property value growth
projections.sales-costs: Estimated at 3% of sale price (agent fees, legal, marketing)
projections.capital-gains-tax: Capital Gains Tax estimated at 50% discount × your selected marginal tax rate.
projections.cumulative-cash-flow: Total rent income minus expenses over the period
projections.annual-cash-return: Equivalent annual return rate — compare against shares or index funds
